h7418b0fbgafc5g4d0agacd6g42e1a73b60a7: The Absolute has taken a great interest in the nautiloid's passengers, it would seem.
hf1fa1f09gee4ag43ddgbc15gbd86b028beeb: All the more reason to keep our 'condition' private.
hcb276487g8d16g4f25ga7a1g2d79443f6ce4: What do you think the Absolute wants with us?
h74377a2eg6327g48b1g9d9bgebfc2e11a55f: A hunter wants only one of three things from its prey:
hbdb59b8fgda8ag4bb8g9d74g906d5f40635a: To know what it knows; to take what it carries; or to sever its head.
hba5dd766g6b76g4142ga435geb63d51bd59c: Whichever the Absolute wants, let's not give it the chance.
hae8aefb6g94ecg42dag8edbg0fa9ee9e13ab: Hobgoblin ramblings, all of it. Pay him no mind.
h43ade8c6g4491g4389gb5b3g3c2b2c31189f: Ragzlin is no scholar, but he does not act from madness.
he88eb2c2gc813g438agafccg5ca2d5dc4658: This 'god' has taken notice of us. That can't be good.
h1afb6714gbaa3g464fg8efcgc6578e8e69d5: The Absolute is a hunter and we are its prey. It can want only one of three things:
h10600abfg2649g438cg9c80ge160581316be: To know what we know; to take what we carry; or to sever our heads.
